item.title: Midwest Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.52% Surge on 18 Mar 2026
item.description: Midwest Ltd, a small-cap player in the diversified consumer products sector, recorded a robust intraday performance on 18 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 1,329, marking a 7.86% increase. This strong uptick outpaced both its sector and the broader market indices, reflecting notable trading momentum. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.12% Surge
item.description: Entero Healthcare Solutions Ltd demonstrated a robust intraday performance on 18 Mar 2026, surging 7.12% to touch a day’s high of Rs 1098.45. The stock outperformed its sector and the broader market, continuing its recent upward momentum with notable trading activity. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Go Fashion (India) Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.23% Surge on 18 Mar 2026
item.description: Go Fashion (India) Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 18 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 255.7, marking a 7.1% increase from its previous close. This rally ended a 13-day consecutive decline, outperforming both its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Angel One Ltd Hits Intraday High with Strong 7.95% Surge on 18 Mar 2026
item.description: Angel One Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 18 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 232.9, marking a 7.33% increase. This strong upward movement outpaced the broader Sensex and sector indices, reflecting notable trading momentum in the capital markets sector. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Shringar House of Mangalsutra Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.18% Surge on 18 Mar 2026
item.description: Shringar House of Mangalsutra Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 18 Mar 2026, surging 7.18% to touch a day’s high of Rs 198.75. This marks a significant rebound after five consecutive days of decline, outperforming its sector and the broader market indices. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: Flair Writing Industries Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.03% Surge on 18 Mar 2026
item.description: Flair Writing Industries Ltd demonstrated robust intraday performance on 18 Mar 2026, surging 7.03% to touch a day’s high of Rs 326.65, outperforming both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 25 minutes ago

item.title: A2Z Infra Engineering Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Shares of A2Z Infra Engineering Ltd surged to hit the upper circuit limit on 18 Mar 2026, propelled by robust buying interest and a maximum daily gain of 4.96%. The micro-cap construction stock outperformed its sector and broader market peers, reflecting renewed investor enthusiasm despite a cautious backdrop marked by falling delivery volumes and regulatory trading freezes. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: United Foodbrands Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit on Robust Buying Pressure
item.description: United Foodbrands Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Leisure Services sector, witnessed a remarkable surge on 18 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a 10.0% gain to close at ₹221.41. This sharp rally was driven by strong buying interest amid a backdrop of falling investor participation and a regulatory freeze on further trading, signalling unfilled demand and heightened market attention. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Rollatainers Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Robust Buying Pressure
item.description: Rollatainers Ltd, a micro-cap player in the packaging sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 18 Mar 2026, propelled by robust buying interest and a notable increase in investor participation. The stock outperformed its sector and benchmark indices, signalling renewed momentum despite its strong sell rating and micro-cap status. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Sterlite Technologies Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit on Robust Buying Momentum
item.description: Sterlite Technologies Ltd (Sterlite Tech) witnessed a remarkable surge on 18 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a 9.56% gain to close at ₹193.00. This strong buying pressure propelled the stock well above its recent trading range, outperforming its sector and broader market indices amid heightened investor interest and a regulatory freeze on further price movement. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: SEPC Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit on Robust Buying Momentum
item.description: SEPC Ltd, a small-cap player in the construction sector, witnessed a remarkable rally on 18 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit limit with a gain of 9.69% to close at ₹5.32. This surge was driven by strong buying interest, significant unfilled demand, and a regulatory freeze on further trading, marking a notable reversal after four consecutive days of decline. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Naga Dhunseri Group Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Shares of Naga Dhunseri Group Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Non Banking Financial Company (NBFC) sector, soared to hit the upper circuit limit on 18 Mar 2026, registering a remarkable 19.96% intraday gain. This surge was driven by intense buying interest amid limited liquidity and a regulatory freeze on further trading, underscoring a day of exceptional market activity for the stock. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Niraj Ispat Industries Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Niraj Ispat Industries Ltd plunged to their lower circuit limit on 18 Mar 2026, closing at ₹216.6, down 5.0% on the day. The micro-cap stock faced intense selling pressure, with volumes drying up and unfilled supply weighing heavily on the price, signalling panic selling among investors. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Tijaria Polypipes Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Tijaria Polypipes Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Plastic Products - Industrial sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 18 Mar 2026, propelled by robust buying interest and a significant spike in delivery volumes. Despite a challenging backdrop marked by a recent downgrade to a Strong Sell rating, the stock’s price action today underscores a notable shift in investor sentiment, albeit accompanied by regulatory trading restrictions. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Ausom Enterprise Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Ausom Enterprise Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Gems, Jewellery and Watches sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 18 Mar 2026, propelled by robust buying interest and a maximum daily gain of 1.42%. Despite underperforming its sector, the stock’s sharp rebound after four consecutive days of decline has caught the attention of investors and market watchers alike. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Omkar Speciality Chemicals Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Shares of Omkar Speciality Chemicals Ltd surged to hit the upper circuit price limit on 18 Mar 2026, reflecting intense buying interest despite the company’s recent underperformance and a micro-cap status. The stock’s maximum daily gain was capped by regulatory limits, underscoring a significant unfilled demand and heightened investor participation in the specialty chemicals sector. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Mahamaya Steel Industries Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Mahamaya Steel Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Iron & Steel Products sector, witnessed a sharp decline on 18 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit of 5%, closing at ₹828.45. The stock underperformed its sector and broader market indices amid intense selling pressure and panic among investors, marking its fourth consecutive day of losses and signalling heightened volatility in this segment. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Dixon Technologies Sees Heavy Put Option Activity Ahead of March Expiry
item.description: Dixon Technologies (India) Ltd has emerged as the most active stock in put options trading this week, with significant volumes concentrated at the ₹10,000 strike price expiring on 30 March 2026. Despite a recent rally, the surge in put option contracts signals a cautious or bearish stance among traders, reflecting hedging strategies or expectations of near-term volatility in this mid-cap electronics and appliances player. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Premier Ltd Shares Plunge to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Premier Ltd, a micro-cap player in the industrial manufacturing sector, plunged to their lower circuit limit on 18 Mar 2026, closing at ₹2.73, down 4.88% on the day. The stock witnessed intense selling pressure, with panic selling and unfilled supply dominating trading activity, signalling deep investor concerns amid deteriorating fundamentals and weak market sentiment. Time: 26 minutes ago

item.title: Dixon Technologies Sees Robust Value Trading Amid Sector Gains
item.description: Dixon Technologies (India) Ltd has emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value on 18 March 2026, reflecting strong investor interest and notable institutional participation. The mid-cap electronics and appliances company recorded a significant 4.17% gain intraday, outperforming the broader Sensex and its sector peers, signalling renewed momentum in a competitive market environment. Time: 26 minutes ago
